mapper.select: SELECT fk_reservation_id AS reservationId, shuttle_booking_id AS shuttleBookingId FROM vw_my_shuttle_reservation_card WHERE fk_member_no = #{memberNo} AND booking_status = 'BOOKED' ORDER BY fk_reservation_id DESC

SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.member_no AS memberNo, r.room_type_id AS roomTypeId, rt.fk_hotel_id AS hotelId, h.hotel_name AS hotelName, r.guest_count AS guestCount, r.checkin_date AS checkinDate, r.checkout_date AS checkoutDate, r.reservation_status AS reservationStatus,
rt.room_name AS roomName, ri.image_url AS roomImageUrl FROM RESERVATION r JOIN ROOM_TYPE rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id JOIN TBL_HOTEL h ON h.hotel_id = rt.fk_hotel_id LEFT JOIN ROOM_IMAGE ri ON ri.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id AND ri.is_main = 'Y' WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}

SELECT shuttle_leg_id AS shuttleLegId, fk_shuttle_booking_id AS shuttleBookingId, fk_timetable_id AS timetableId, leg_type AS legType, ride_date AS rideDate, place_code AS placeCode, depart_time AS departTime, ticket_qty AS ticketQty, leg_status AS legStatus FROM TBL_SHUTTLE_BOOKING_LEG WHERE fk_shuttle_booking_id = #{bookingId} AND leg_status = 'BOOKED' ORDER BY leg_type, depart_time

SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.member_no AS memberNo, r.room_type_id AS roomTypeId, rt.fk_hotel_id AS hotelId, h.hotel_name AS hotelName, r.guest_count AS guestCount, r.checkin_date AS checkinDate, r.checkout_date AS checkoutDate, r.reservation_status AS reservationStatus FROM RESERVATION r JOIN ROOM_TYPE rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id JOIN TBL_HOTEL h ON h.hotel_id = rt.fk_hotel_id WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}

SELECT t.timetable_id AS timetableId, t.fk_hotel_id AS hotelId, t.leg_type AS legType, t.place_code AS placeCode, p.place_name AS placeName, t.depart_time AS departTime FROM TBL_SHUTTLE_TIMETABLE t JOIN TBL_SHUTTLE_PLACE p ON p.place_code = t.place_code WHERE t.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND t.leg_type = #{legType} AND t.active_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY t.depart_time ASC

SELECT t.timetable_id AS timetableId, t.fk_hotel_id AS hotelId, t.leg_type AS legType, t.place_code AS placeCode, p.place_name AS placeName, t.depart_time AS departTime FROM TBL_SHUTTLE_TIMETABLE t JOIN TBL_SHUTTLE_PLACE p ON p.place_code = t.place_code WHERE t.timetable_id = #{timetableId}
SELECT capacity AS capacity, booked_qty AS bookedQty FROM TBL_SHUTTLE_SLOT_STOCK WHERE fk_timetable_id = #{timetableId} AND ride_date = TRUNC(#{rideDate})
SELECT capacity AS capacity, booked_qty AS bookedQty FROM TBL_SHUTTLE_SLOT_STOCK WHERE fk_timetable_id = #{timetableId} AND ride_date = TRUNC(#{rideDate}) FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SHUTTLE_SLOT_STOCK SET booked_qty = booked_qty + #{qty}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE fk_timetable_id = #{timetableId} AND ride_date = TRUNC(#{rideDate})
UPDATE TBL_SHUTTLE_SLOT_STOCK SET booked_qty = GREATEST(booked_qty - #{qty}, 0), updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE fk_timetable_id = #{timetableId} AND ride_date = TRUNC(#{rideDate})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SHUTTLE_BOOKING (shuttle_booking_id, fk_reservation_id, fk_hotel_id, fk_member_no, ride_date, status) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_SHUTTLE_BOOKING.NEXTVAL, #{reservationId}, #{hotelId}, #{memberNo}, TRUNC(#{rideDate}), 'BOOKED')
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SHUTTLE_BOOKING SET status='CANCELED', canceled_at=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE shuttle_booking_id = #{bookingId}
UPDATE TBL_SHUTTLE_BOOKING SET status = 'BOOKED', canceled_at = NULL WHERE shuttle_booking_id = #{bookingId}
mapper.select: SELECT shuttle_leg_id AS shuttleLegId, fk_shuttle_booking_id AS shuttleBookingId, fk_timetable_id AS timetableId, leg_type AS legType, ride_date AS rideDate, place_code AS placeCode, depart_time AS departTime, ticket_qty AS ticketQty, leg_status AS legStatus FROM TBL_SHUTTLE_BOOKING_LEG WHERE fk_shuttle_booking_id = #{bookingId} AND leg_type = #{legType} ORDER BY depart_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SHUTTLE_BOOKING_LEG (shuttle_leg_id, fk_shuttle_booking_id, fk_timetable_id, leg_type, ride_date, place_code, depart_time, ticket_qty, leg_status, created_at) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_SHUTTLE_BOOKING_LEG.NEXTVAL, #{bookingId}, #{timetableId}, #{legType}, TRUNC(#{rideDate}), #{placeCode}, #{departTime}, #{ticketQty}, 'BOOKED', SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT shuttle_leg_id AS shuttleLegId, fk_shuttle_booking_id AS shuttleBookingId, fk_timetable_id AS timetableId, leg_type AS legType, ride_date AS rideDate, place_code AS placeCode, depart_time AS departTime, ticket_qty AS ticketQty, leg_status AS legStatus FROM TBL_SHUTTLE_BOOKING_LEG WHERE fk_shuttle_booking_id = #{bookingId} AND fk_timetable_id = #{timetableId} AND ride_date = TRUNC(#{rideDate}) FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT shuttle_leg_id AS shuttleLegId, fk_shuttle_booking_id AS shuttleBookingId, fk_timetable_id AS timetableId, leg_type AS legType, ride_date AS rideDate, place_code AS placeCode, depart_time AS departTime, ticket_qty AS ticketQty, leg_status AS legStatus FROM TBL_SHUTTLE_BOOKING_LEG WHERE fk_shuttle_booking_id = #{bookingId} AND leg_type = #{legType} AND leg_status = 'BOOKED' ORDER BY depart_time
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SHUTTLE_BOOKING_LEG SET ticket_qty = #{ticketQty}, leg_status = 'BOOKED', canceled_at = NULL WHERE shuttle_leg_id = #{legId}
UPDATE TBL_SHUTTLE_BOOKING_LEG SET leg_status='CANCELED', canceled_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE shuttle_leg_id = #{legId} AND leg_status='BOOKED'
